title: What is the difference between 20 and 222
display_title: What is the difference between 20 and 222
wikitext:
[]: What is the difference between 2.0 and 2.22?             Quote Post by shinji kun » Wed Mar 02, 2011 8:04 pm I just downloaded and watched Evangelion 2.22 and I think it has no different with Evangelion 2.0. They're just the same! How do you think about this?

[]: Re: Diffrence beetwen Evangelion 2.0 and 2.22             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Mar 02, 2011 8:05 pm Shinji kun wrote: I just downloaded and watched Evangelion 2.22 and I think it has no different with Evangelion 2.0. They're just the same! How do you think about this?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Mar 02, 2011 8:31 pm There were a few minor scenes added, and some existing scenes were reanimated to look better.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 02, 2011 8:47 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_2.0_vs._Evangelion_2.22

[]: Re: Diffrence beetwen Evangelion 2.0 and 2.22             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Mar 02, 2011 8:51 pm Shinji kun wrote: I just downloaded and watched Evangelion 2.22 and I think it has no different with Evangelion 2.0. They're just the same! How do you think about this?

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Thu Mar 03, 2011 6:57 am Ornette wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_2.0_vs._Evangelion_2.22

[]: What is the difference between 2.0 and 2.22?             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Sep 29, 2011 4:37 pm I am considering buying 2.0 for myself on DVD, but I want to know if I should consider buying 2.22. but first, I want to know what the difference between 2.22 and 2.0 is. also, has 2.22/2.0 been released on DVD in New Zealand yet?

[]:             Quote Post by John » Thu Sep 29, 2011 4:49 pm 2.0 is the version shown in cinemas. 2.22 has fixed contrast, and a lot of edited/added scenes . I don't know anything about any kind of bonus, like behind the scenes, or storyboards. But I may suppose they're also added.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Sep 29, 2011 10:52 pm 2.22 looks much nicer although part of that might stem from the...source...I used to watch 2.0

[]: Re: Diffrence beetwen Evangelion 2.0 and 2.22             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Sep 29, 2011 11:24 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: maybe you just got ripped off and got 2.0 instead of 2.22

[]: Re: Diffrence beetwen Evangelion 2.0 and 2.22             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Sep 30, 2011 12:47 am gatotsu911 wrote: How can you get ripped off on an illegal download?

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Sep 30, 2011 1:18 am You get what you pay for, brah.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Oct 01, 2011 12:17 pm Stick with whatever new versions of Evangelion are presented. 1.11 and 2.22 are always better than the cinema versions. Glad that Japan never did a 2.02 for EVA 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Oct 01, 2011 4:06 pm Why wasn't there a 2.02? I don't see any real reason to take it away.
